# Basquio

> Basquio is an AI-native data-to-presentation tool. Upload CSV, Excel, or spreadsheet data and get back a finished analysis deck with real charts, a narrative report, and editable PPTX output. The only tool that bridges data analysis (Tableau, Power BI) and presentation design (Gamma, Beautiful.ai) in one automated workflow.

Basquio was built by NielsenIQ analysts and CPG brand managers who spent years building category review decks manually. It reads structured data files, computes metrics with code (not AI hallucination), generates real charts, writes audience-aware narratives, and delivers branded PPTX + PDF from one run.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://basquio.com): Main landing page with product overview and pricing snapshot
- [How It Works](https://basquio.com/how-it-works): Four-stage workflow from data upload to finished deck
- [Compare](https://basquio.com/compare): Feature comparison vs generic AI, slide generators, and BI tools
- [Pricing](https://basquio.com/pricing): $10/report (first free), $149/mo teams, custom enterprise

## Blog

- [The Complete Guide to Data-to-Presentation Tools in 2026](https://basquio.com/blog/complete-guide-data-to-presentation-tools-2026): Category guide comparing all approaches from manual PowerPoint to AI-native tools
- [Basquio vs Gamma](https://basquio.com/blog/basquio-vs-gamma-data-analysis-vs-slide-design): Data analysis vs slide design, honest comparison
- [Automate Category Review Decks from NielsenIQ Data](https://basquio.com/blog/automate-category-review-decks-nielseniq-data): CPG workflow automation guide
- [Basquio vs Beautiful.ai for Data Teams](https://basquio.com/blog/basquio-vs-beautiful-ai-for-data-teams): Which tool fits data-driven workflows
- [AI for Consultants: Data Analysis to Client Decks](https://basquio.com/blog/ai-for-consultants-data-analysis-to-client-decks): How consulting firms automate data-heavy reporting
- [How to Turn Excel Data into Presentation Slides](https://basquio.com/blog/how-to-turn-excel-data-into-presentation-slides-automatically): All 6 approaches compared from manual to AI-native

- [About](https://basquio.com/about): Team background: NielsenIQ, Mondelez, Victorinox
